creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
Wesley Shields wrote:
> This patch is incomplete. It is missing the distinfo section.
> Also, this port is not fetching properly now. It appears the distfiles
> for 2010-02-02 are no longer there?
>
>   
I have NEVER had to submit distinfo.  What purpose does make makesum 
have?  Why in the world would I do anything with distinfo. 

It took you several weeks to get around to trying this patch.  The 
release is now at 2010-03-01.  Try it with the next patch. 

I still refuse to submit distinfo patches.

/Joe
